fields.name: Spice Garden
fields.description: A family-friendly restaurant serving authentic Pakistani, Chinese, and BBQ dishes.

fields.name: Italian Delights
fields.description: Authentic Italian cuisine featuring handmade pasta, wood-fired pizzas, and desserts.

fields.name: Sushi World
fields.description: Japanese restaurant offering sushi, sashimi, ramen, and tempura.

fields.name: The Coastal Table
fields.description: A cozy seafood restaurant offering fresh catches and coastal-inspired dishes.

fields.name: Spice Route
fields.description: Authentic Pakistani and South Asian cuisine with a modern twist.

fields.name: Bella Italia
fields.description: Traditional Italian trattoria known for wood-fired pizza and homemade pasta.

fields.name: Beef Steak
fields.description: A beef steak is a flat, premium slice of beef cut across the muscle fibers. Prized for its rich, savory flavor and tender texture, it is typically seasoned and cooked via methods like pan-searing, grilling, or broiling.

fields.name: Burger Junction and Switzz
fields.description: Serving juicy beef burgers, crispy fries, and refreshing beverages.

fields.name: Cheese Pizza
fields.description: A classic cheese pizza consists of a flat, baked dough base spread with a savory tomato sauce and topped with a generous layer of melted cheese

fields.name: Steak pizza
fields.description: a hearty, savory pie that replaces traditional processed meats with tender, seasoned slices of beef.

fields.name: Tiramisu
fields.description: Espresso-soaked ladyfingers layered with a whipped, airy mascarpone cream and dusted with dark cocoa powder.

fields.name: Steak Deal
fields.description: typically feature a protein, sides, and a beverage at a discounted promotional price
